name: USP消音版 | 沙漠战术
descriptionEn: A fan favorite from Counter-Strike Source, the Silenced USP Pistol has a detachable silencer that gives shots less recoil while suppressing attention-getting noise. It has been custom painted with an olive-colored tactical camouflage. Base models don't have to be boring
descriptionZh: 从《反恐精英：起源》中穿越而来，是玩家们的最爱，消音版 USP 手枪装有一个可拆卸的消音器，降低后坐力的同时还能抑制住容易引起注意的枪声。 这把武器使用橄榄色的战术迷彩进行了自定义涂装。 屡见不鲜，别有风味
